trigger.description: A planned lifecycle transition loses its compare-and-set race because another writer already changed the memory level or tombstone state.
setup_commands: ee remember 'Concurrent lifecycle marker.' --workspace . --level working --kind fact --workflow wf-conflict
ee memory level <memory_id> --from working --to episodic --reason 'first writer completed the workflow' --workspace . --json
trigger.invocation: ee memory level <memory_id> --from working --to episodic --reason 'stale worker retries the planned transition' --workspace . --json
